headline: Is There Still Room In ONEOK (OKE) After A 22.5% Year-To-Date Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether ONEOK's current share price reflects its true value, this breakdown will help you connect the recent market action with what the underlying numbers suggest. The stock last closed at US$91.03, with returns of 6.0% over 7 days, 7.3% over 30 days, 22.5% year to date, 11.6% over 1 year, 82.0% over 3 years and 123.4% over 5 years. This gives useful context before comparing price with value. Recent market moves have been shaped by ongoing attention on ONEOK as a key...
